workflow.name: Route and qualify email leads with Gmail, Gemini, Slack, Sheets and Salesforce
workflow.description:
# Email Lead Router: Gmail → Gemini → Salesforce Pipeline

**Who is this for?**  
Event sales teams & conference organizers processing 100+ sponsor/partner emails weekly who need instant lead qualification, Salesforce automation, & pipeline analytics.
___

**What problem is this workflow solving?**  
**Event email chaos kills revenue:**  

- 200+ sponsor emails/week → manual Salesforce entry  
- No sentiment/intent scoring = missed $ opps  
- 10+ hours/week routing + logging  
- Fragmented pipeline visibility  

**Zero-drop AI qualification → auto-Salesforce → team routing.**

___

**What this workflow does**

1. **Gmail Trigger** captures event inbox emails  
2. **Gemini #1** scores sentiment (Positive/Neutral/Negative + confidence)  
3. **Gemini #2** extracts topic, intent, urgency (1-10), org, budget signals  
4. **Upserts Salesforce Lead** (deduped by email) w/ 9 custom fields: Sentiment__c, Urgency_Score__c, etc.  
5. **Hot leads** (Positive + urgency ≥7) → auto **Salesforce Opportunity**  
6. **Creates Salesforce Task** w/ AI-suggested follow-up action  
7. **Logs** to `email_analytics` Data Table + Google Sheets (Looker Studio dashboard)  
8. **Routes**: Positive → Hot email + Slack #hot-leads (2h); Neutral → Follow-up + #follow-ups (24h); Negative → Insights + #insights  

___

**Setup (8 minutes):**  

- Gmail OAuth2 (event inbox)  
- Google Gemini API  
- **Salesforce OAuth2** + **9 custom Lead fields** (`Sentiment__c`, `Urgency_Score__c`, etc.)  
- Slack OAuth2 + channels (`#hot-leads`, `#follow-ups`, `#insights`)  
- `email_analytics` Data Table ID  
- Update Send Email recipients  
- Test w/ Evaluation Dataset  

___
**How to customize:**  

- Tune urgency threshold (7→8)  
- Add event keywords (webinar/tradeshow)  
- Swap Slack → Teams; Salesforce → HubSpot  
- Multi-inbox territory routing  

___
**ROI:**  

- **100% Salesforce coverage** (no manual entry)  
- **8x faster qualification** (2min vs 16h/week)  
- **30% opp velocity** (auto opps/tasks)  
- **Live Looker dashboard** → data-driven decisions  

---

**Need help customizing?**: 
Contact me for consulting and support: [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/milobravo/) / [Message](https://tally.so/r/EkKGgB) 
___

**Keywords:** event sales leads, Salesforce automation, Gemini lead scoring, email sentiment, sales pipeline n8n, AI sales routing

workflow.name: Email Sentiment for Event Sales Lead Routing TEMPLATE

options.systemPromptTemplate:
You are a highly accurate sentiment analyzer specialized in the events and conferences industry. Analyze the sentiment of incoming emails related to event sponsorship, exhibition, attendance, speaking opportunities, vendor partnerships, and general event inquiries.

Categorize each email into EXACTLY ONE of these categories: {categories}

**Positive**: The sender shows clear interest, enthusiasm, or intent to sponsor, exhibit, attend, speak, or partner. They are asking about pricing, availability, packages, or next steps. Includes referrals, warm introductions, and repeat clients.

**Neutral**: The sender is gathering information, asking general questions, requesting brochures or agendas, or has not yet indicated clear buying intent. Includes early-stage inquiries and informational requests.

**Negative**: The sender is declining, canceling, expressing dissatisfaction, complaining about pricing, withdrawing interest, or making unfavorable comparisons to competitor events. Includes cancellation requests and negative feedback.

IMPORTANT: Evaluate sentiment relative to OUR event/company. If the sender is negative about a competitor but positive toward us, classify as Positive. Focus on buying intent and business relationship signals.

YOU MUST CHOOSE EXACTLY ONE CATEGORY!
Use the provided formatting instructions.

parameters.message:
=

🔥 High-Interest Event Lead Detected

Sentiment: {{ $('Analyze Email Sentiment').item.json.sentimentAnalysis.category }}

Confidence: {{ $('Analyze Email Sentiment').item.json.sentimentAnalysis.confidence || 'N/A' }}

Original Email

From: {{ $('Monitor Gmail Inbox').item.json.from }}

Subject: {{ $('Monitor Gmail Inbox').item.json.subject }}

Date: {{ $('Monitor Gmail Inbox').item.json.date }}

{{ $('Monitor Gmail Inbox').item.json.text }}

Recommended Action: Prioritize immediate outreach. This contact is showing strong buying signals for event sponsorship, exhibition, or attendance. Respond within 2 hours for best conversion.

— Email Sentiment Router | Braia Labs
parameters.subject: =🔥 Hot Lead — {{ $('Monitor Gmail Inbox').item.json.subject }}

parameters.message:
=

📊 Negative Sentiment — Market Intelligence

Sentiment: {{ $('Analyze Email Sentiment').item.json.sentimentAnalysis.category }}

Confidence: {{ $('Analyze Email Sentiment').item.json.sentimentAnalysis.confidence || 'N/A' }}

Original Email

From: {{ $('Monitor Gmail Inbox').item.json.from }}

Subject: {{ $('Monitor Gmail Inbox').item.json.subject }}

Date: {{ $('Monitor Gmail Inbox').item.json.date }}

{{ $('Monitor Gmail Inbox').item.json.text }}

Recommended Action: Log this as competitive intelligence. The sender expressed dissatisfaction or disinterest — review for common objections, pricing concerns, or competitor mentions that can inform event marketing strategy.

— Email Sentiment Router | Braia Labs
parameters.subject: =📊 Market Insight — {{ $('Monitor Gmail Inbox').item.json.subject }}

parameters.message:
=

📋 Neutral Lead — Follow-up Required

Sentiment: {{ $('Analyze Email Sentiment').item.json.sentimentAnalysis.category }}

Confidence: {{ $('Analyze Email Sentiment').item.json.sentimentAnalysis.confidence || 'N/A' }}

Original Email

From: {{ $('Monitor Gmail Inbox').item.json.from }}

Subject: {{ $('Monitor Gmail Inbox').item.json.subject }}

Date: {{ $('Monitor Gmail Inbox').item.json.date }}

{{ $('Monitor Gmail Inbox').item.json.text }}

Recommended Action: This contact is inquiring about event details but hasn't shown strong commitment. Schedule a nurture follow-up within 24-48 hours with event highlights, speaker lineup, or early-bird offers.

— Email Sentiment Router | Braia Labs
parameters.subject: =📋 Follow-up Needed — {{ $('Monitor Gmail Inbox').item.json.subject }}

parameters.content:
## Email Sentiment Router for Event Sales Leads

### **What it does:**
Automatically analyzes incoming event/conference emails using Google Gemini AI, extracts structured business intelligence (topic, intent, urgency, entities), routes them to the right sales team, and logs everything to an analytics data table.

### **Why it matters:**
Event organizers receive hundreds of inbound emails from sponsors, exhibitors, speakers, attendees, and partners. This automation ensures no high-value lead falls through the cracks, every inquiry gets the right response speed, and you build a data-driven picture of your event pipeline over time.

### **How it works:**
- Gmail Trigger monitors your inbox for new event-related emails
- Google Gemini #1 analyzes sentiment (Positive / Neutral / Negative)
- Google Gemini #2 extracts topic, intent, urgency, org, budget signals
- Every email is logged to the `email_analytics` Data Table + Google Sheets
- Every email upserts a **Salesforce Lead** (deduped by email) with sentiment + enrichment
- Hot leads (Positive + urgency >= 7) auto-create **Salesforce Opportunities**
- Every lead gets a **Salesforce Task** with the AI-suggested follow-up action
- Google Sheets feeds a **Looker Studio** dashboard for real-time visual analytics
- Positive → Hot Lead email + Slack #hot-leads (respond within 2h)
- Neutral → Follow-up email + Slack #follow-ups (nurture within 24-48h)
- Negative → Insights email + Slack #insights (log for marketing strategy)

### **Setup steps:**
1. Connect your **Gmail** OAuth2 credential
2. Connect your **Google Gemini** API credential
3. Connect your **Slack** OAuth2 credential
4. Create the `email_analytics` **Data Table** and update the table ID in the Log node
5. Update recipient email addresses in Send Email nodes (currently placeholders)
6. Verify Slack channels `#hot-leads`, `#follow-ups`, `#insights` exist
7. Connect your **Salesforce** OAuth2 credential (Setup > App Manager > New Connected App)
8. Create 9 custom fields on the Salesforce **Lead** object: `Sentiment__c`, `Sentiment_Confidence__c`, `Primary_Topic__c`, `Lead_Intent__c`, `Urgency_Score__c`, `Budget_Mentioned__c`, `Event_Referenced__c`, `Email_Domain__c`, `Last_Email_Subject__c`
9. Run the Evaluation Dataset to test accuracy before activating

## 1. Email Trigger

Monitors Gmail inbox every minute for new incoming event/conference emails. Captures full email metadata including sender, subject, body text, and date.

## 2. AI Sentiment & Intelligence Extraction

**Step 1:** Google Gemini classifies email sentiment as **Positive**, **Neutral**, or **Negative** — tuned for event/conference buying intent.

**Step 2:** A second Gemini call extracts structured intelligence: topic, intent, urgency (1-10), org name, contact, budget signals, and suggested action.

**Step 3:** Switch node re-routes by sentiment category to the Gate nodes.

## 3. Sentiment Routing Gate

Routes emails to the correct team based on AI classification. Safety gates prevent accidental emails during evaluation/testing runs.

## 5. Team Notifications

Sends formatted email alerts and Slack channel posts per sentiment route:
- **Positive** → Hot Lead Email + `#hot-leads`
- **Neutral** → Follow-up Email + `#follow-ups`
- **Negative** → Insights Email + `#insights`

## Evaluation Framework (Optional)

Test AI accuracy against a golden dataset before going live. Connect different Gemini models (Flash Lite, Flash, Pro) to compare performance and latency.

**Note:** This section only runs when triggered from the Evaluation Dataset — it never interferes with production email routing.

## Evaluation Metrics

Records AI output vs. expected labels and calculates categorization accuracy across the test dataset.

attributes.name: primary_topic
attributes.description: The main topic of this email. Must be exactly one of: sponsorship, exhibition, attendance, speaking, logistics, pricing, registration, partnership, complaint, general

attributes.name: secondary_topics
attributes.description: Other topics mentioned in the email, as a comma-separated string. Use same topic values as primary_topic.

attributes.name: intent
attributes.description: The sender's intent. Must be exactly one of: booking_inquiry, information_request, complaint, cancellation, referral, follow_up, general

attributes.name: urgency_score
attributes.description: Urgency level from 1 (low, just browsing) to 10 (critical, ready to buy/cancel immediately). Consider budget mentions, deadlines, and action language.

attributes.name: org_name
attributes.description: The sender's organization/company name. Extract from signature, email domain, or body. Empty string if unknown.

attributes.name: contact_name
attributes.description: The sender's full name. Extract from signature or greeting. Empty string if unknown.

attributes.name: budget_mentioned
attributes.description: Whether a specific budget, price, or monetary amount is mentioned. true or false.

attributes.name: event_referenced
attributes.description: The name of the specific event or conference mentioned. Empty string if none.

attributes.name: suggested_action
attributes.description: A brief one-sentence recommended next action for the sales team. Be specific and actionable.

parameters.content:
## 4. Analytics Logging

Logs every processed email to:
- **n8n Data Table** (`email_analytics`)  for weekly digests
- **Google Sheets**  for Looker Studio dashboards

Both run as parallel taps — never block the main routing flow.

## Was this helpful? Get in touch!

 I really hope this automation helped you. Your feedback is incredibly valuable and helps me create better resources for business and the n8n community.

### **Have Feedback, a Question, or a Project Idea?**

I've streamlined the way we connect. It all starts with one simple form that takes less than 10 seconds. After that, you'll chat with my AI assistant who will gather the key details and pass them directly on to me.

####  **[Start the conversation here](https://tally.so/r/EkKGgB)** 

*   **Give Feedback:** Share your thoughts on this template—whether you found a typo, encountered an unexpected error, have a suggestion, or just want to say thanks!

*   **n8n Consulting:** Have a complex business challenge or need a custom workflow built from scratch? Let's partner on a powerful automation solution tailored to your specific needs.

*   **Join your team:** We can work together to get you launched with confidence. 

---

Happy Automating!
[Milo Bravo](https://linkedin.com/in/MiloBravo/) | BRaiA Labs | Automation & BI Systems + AI Integration

## 6. CRM Integration (Salesforce)

Every processed email automatically syncs to Salesforce:
- **Upsert Lead** — deduplicated by email address
- **Create Task** — AI-suggested follow-up action
- **Create Opportunity** — only for hot leads (Positive sentiment + urgency >= 7 or budget mentioned)

All CRM nodes use `continueOnFail` — Salesforce errors never block email routing.

data.details:
The IF node can be used to implement binary conditional logic in your workflow. You can set up one-to-many conditions to evaluate each item of data being inputted into the node. That data will either evaluate to TRUE or FALSE and route out of the node accordingly.

This node has multiple types of conditions: Bool, String, Number, and Date & Time.
